name: Rump Roast Casserole (Rr)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups rump roast leftover from drunken rump
1 cup beef broth leftover from drunken rump
recipeInstructions:
THIS IS A LEFTOVER RECIPE FOR USE WITH THE DRUNKEN RUMP ROAST MASTER RECIPE.
1. Heat oil in a large, deep-sided skillet.
2. Saute cabbage and onions until limp, about 3-5 minutes.
3. Add mushrooms and continue to saute over medium-high heat until the mushrooms have lost most of their moisture, another 5 minutes.
4. Add rump roast, mustard, and broth. Simmer until the liquid is almost all absorbed.
5. Toss in cooked noodles; serve immediately.
Suggested Wine: A hearty zinfandel (not white)
NOTES: Serve with hot rye rolls and follow with bleu cheese grapes.
